speaker: Radosław Sikorski
text: Globalization was not a progressivist project but a business project tinged with racism — about exporting dirty jobs and maximizing profits — so framing it as left-wing ideology is historically false.
context: Direct rebuttal to Macinka's framing of globalization as progressivism.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
